title: DriftSignal — Canonical Core Primitive
description: Represents divergence between expected and observed state. Links a decision episode to the drift that triggered corrective action.

decisionId.description: Decision episode that produced this drift.

relatedClaims.description: Claim IDs affected by this drift.

trigger.description: What caused the drift (e.g., half_life_expiry, contradiction, policy_change).

status.description: Lifecycle status of this drift signal.

telemetryRefs.description: References to telemetry data supporting detection.

expectedState.description: What was expected based on the decision.
